query: The FHIR client is getting HTTP 429 from Epic's API — we need exponential backoff with retry-after header support. Can you update src/core/fhir/client.py?
Epic sends clinical notes in 4 different content types — text/plain, text/html, application/xml, and application/pdf. The DocumentReference parser only handles plain text. Can you add the others?
The encounter class mapping is wrong — OBSENC is being treated as inpatient but it should map to outpatient coding rules. Fix src/core/fhir/resources.py
Epic access tokens expire in 5 minutes, not the standard 60. Our TokenManager needs to proactively refresh when <60 seconds remain
I need to implement the circuit breaker pattern for FHIR calls — CLOSED after 3 consecutive failures becomes OPEN, then HALF_OPEN after 60 seconds
A patient has opted out via 21st Century Cures Act and the FHIR API returns 404. We need to handle this gracefully and enable manual coding mode
The clinical note has a relatesTo.code of 'appends' — does that mean we analyze both the original and addendum, or just the addendum?
I need to add SMART on FHIR JWT assertion authentication to the FHIR client. Epic requires RS384 signing
The mcp_fhir_get_clinical_notes function needs to filter DocumentReferences by LOINC type code — only fetch discharge summaries (18842-5) and H&P notes (34117-2)
When an encounter converts from observation (OBSENC) to inpatient (IMP), we need to discard all previous coding analysis and re-analyze. How should we detect this transition?
The FHIR client should return DegradedResult instead of raising exceptions — per Article II.5, we never block the coder workflow
I need to parse C-CDA XML to extract the Assessment section (LOINC 51848-0) and Plan of Treatment (18776-5) from a DocumentReference
The DRG grouper needs to calculate the revenue delta between DRG 291 and 293 — what's the weight difference?
I need to write a non-leading CDI query for AKI detection based on creatinine rise
Can you add the Excludes 1 validation for E10.x and E11.x to the rules engine?
Write a structlog PHI filter that blocks patient names and SSNs from appearing in logs
I need to check whether MRI spine (CPT 72141) requires prior auth from Cigna
Can you update the NLP temporal reasoning module to detect 'within 48 hours' patterns for AKI KDIGO staging?
The coding agent's confidence threshold is set to 0.65 — should we lower it to 0.50 for the senior review queue?
I need to generate a CFO-facing revenue narrative explaining why documenting acute-on-chronic systolic HF matters
